content:
Until the first person is killed. One cop dies, and the other cracks.

The crowd overtakes the other cop, and his gun.

They fight over the gun, someone grabs it, and Leader’s dad, attacks them, and steals it nearly unloading the whole clip into the original gun retriever.

The current gun owner, Leader’s dad, doesn’t accept that he can be the only one who leaves. He tries to barter with the forces that be.

The gun is emptied into another person. The cop who regains his courage. And leader’s dad.
context: From document: Open View Act II.b Rough Sketch — chunk 2 (chunk 2/2)
